title: UPVC Door Handles - Polished Brass Lever/Lever 92mm PZ (Centres) 210mm Screw to Backplate 242mm X 34mm Handle External Replacement Handles, Gold, 245 x 34 x 55mm (21092PB)
features: ***PLEASE CONFIRM MEASUREMENTS IN THE GUIDE IN IMAGES BEFORE ORDERING*** Measurements - Polished Brass PVC Door Handle Measurements - 210mm from Screw to Screw, Backplate Measures 242mm X 34mm, 92mm PZ (Centres - From centre of Keyhole to centre of door handle spindle. Please check these crucial measurements to ensure these Handles are suitable for you. Full Measurements are in the line drawings in the images.
Quality Tested - Reliable and long lasting upvc door handle which have been cycle tested over 50,000 operations. Non-Handed upvc handle, can be fitted to left or right handed upvc doors.

Quality Finish - The Polished Brass replacement upvc door handles have been salt spray tested for over 240 Hours, which proves they are hard wearing and the quality finish will last and pass the test of time. Suitable for fitting in Coastal Areas where high salt content would normally damage handle finish.

Application - Can be fitted to Left or Right Handed Doors. The UK Security Supplies replacement UPVC Door Handles can be fitted on various Door Types including; UPVC, PVC, PVCu, Timber, Wooden, Bifold, French Door Handles, Exterior Door Handle, Patio Door Handles, Double Glazed Door Locks, conservatory door handles and Front or Back Doors.

Whats In The Box - 1x Pair of Polished Brass Handles 1x Pair of Spring Cassettes (Fit with these for Sprung Handles or without for Un-Sprung) 2x Sets of Fixing Bolts (1x Long and 1x Short, use the appropriate length depending on door thickness for an easy and convenient installation) 1x 8mm Door Handle Spindle
